project_acceptance.observable: The CLI output redacts exact access_token keys case-insensitively.
access_token_hint, token_type, and existing recursive behavior are preserved.

tasks.objective: Add access_token redaction to the CLI adapter before serialization.

context_refs.claim: The adapter is the downstream boundary that owns OAuth-specific policy.

tasks.handoff: Finish after the CLI tests pass.

tasks.objective: Leave shared sanitizer policy unchanged for API compatibility.

context_refs.claim: The shared policy should not absorb adapter-specific OAuth behavior.

acceptance.observable: Direct sanitize callers retain their prior behavior.

assumptions.statement: Only serialized CLI events can contain OAuth tokens.
